description: CompositionBlack, white and blue plaid shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves that have rolled hem with black panels and with a print on the black panel on the right sleeve, patch pockets on the chest with buttoned flaps and with embroidered brand name and lettering over left chest pocket in black thread and with a full buttoned placketFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in warm water Wash only with like colours Use mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade Use warm iron With summer here, there is no better way to keep your cool than by opting for a short sleeved cotton shirt from spykar. The black, white and blue plaid checks give a smart appearance and the short sleeves keep you feeling fresh all day. Team this with jeans and and canvas shoes for a casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
